seoTitle: Lockyer vs Lol Gray — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Lockyer vs Lol Gray: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lockyer and Lol Gray.
heading: Lockyer vs Lol Gray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lockyer, Western Australia and Lol Gray, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lockyer has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lol Gray (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lockyer or Lol Gray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lockyer has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Lol Gray scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lockyer scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Lol Gray scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lockyer or Lol Gray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lockyer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
